meta.name: Black Soil Water Erosion Intelligent Prediction and Evidence-Based Evaluation Platform Component Library
meta.principle: Components expose research state and gate evidence; decoration must clarify workflow or risk.

components.name: CommandHero
do: Mention P0-P3 scientific chain
Use grid cue and deep soil/green gradient

components.name: StageTile
do: Use active only for current stage group
Keep labels short
dont: Use active state as proof of gate PASS

components.name: MetricChip
do: Use for counts/model/run-level summaries

components.name: EvidenceItem
components.purpose: Expose run lineage and gate state.
do: Show Run ID and gate verdict
Keep PASS_WITH_RISKS visible

components.name: DesignSystemStrip
do: Link to design assets
State real-tool constraints

components.name: OptionAction
components.purpose: Stage-specific action bound to real workflow behavior.
do: Map action to real tool or explicit navigation/reset
Describe outcome and risk

components.name: GateWorkbench
components.purpose: Summarize P0-P3 gate readiness from real session state without replacing error-corrector reports.
do: Keep PASS_WITH_RISKS and BLOCK explicit
Use as navigation/status aid only
dont: Treat derived card state as official scientific gate proof

components.name: ResultWorkbench
components.purpose: Product-grade stage result surface for model ranking, explanation artifacts, evidence bundles, and gate indexes.
do: Use tabs to reduce chat-scroll dependency
Rank bars must be derived from real RMSE values
Render only real session/file artifacts
Artifact gallery must use existing image paths
Bundle entry cards must point to existing package files or show pending
Gate summary must parse existing gate JSON verdicts
Show empty states when artifacts are absent
dont: Count gates without reading existing JSON files
Show generated-looking thumbnails when files do not exist
Use decorative rank bars without metric backing
Show method/reproduce/gate/index entries as available before export
Invent model metrics, image previews, downloads, or gate reports
